summary: Iteration 18: DigiLocker Verification Integration Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All UI flows verified: DigiLocker card displays correctly, Aadhaar/PAN verification works, VERIFIED badge shows in customer header when both are verified, timeline events created for verifications.
passed_tests: Login with shyam@rudrik.io / Assword@0231
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/aadhaar with valid 12-digit number returns verified status
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/aadhaar with invalid number returns 400
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/aadhaar with non-digit characters returns 400
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/aadhaar with empty number returns 400
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/aadhaar with missing field returns 400
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/pan with valid PAN returns verified status with pan_type and name_match_score
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/pan with lowercase PAN auto-uppercases
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/pan with invalid short PAN returns 400
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/pan with invalid long PAN returns 400
POST /api/customers/{id}/verify/pan with empty PAN returns 400
GET /api/customers/{id}/verifications returns aadhaar + pan + overall status
GET /api/customers/{invalid_id}/verifications returns 404
After both Aadhaar and PAN are verified, overall_kyc_status becomes 'verified'
Timeline events are created for each verification (Aadhaar Verified, PAN Verified)
Customer detail page shows DigiLocker Verification card with Aadhaar and PAN sections
Aadhaar input accepts only digits, max 12
PAN input auto-uppercases, max 10
After verification, card shows VERIFIED badge with details (last4, holder name, pan_type, match score)
Verified badge appears next to customer name in header when both are verified
Dashboard still loads correctly
Screening page still works with Demo Mode badge
critical_code_review_comments: DigiLocker service properly implements demo mode with realistic verification results
Backend correctly validates Aadhaar (12 digits only) and PAN (10 chars) formats
Verification results properly stored in customer.kyc_verifications
Timeline events correctly created for each verification
Frontend DigiLockerCard component properly handles verified/not_verified states
VERIFIED badge correctly shows only when BOTH Aadhaar AND PAN are verified
PARTIALLY VERIFIED badge shows when only one is verified
seed_data_creation: None - used existing TEST_RiskScoreCustomer for verification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DigiLocker verification fully tested. Key data-testid attributes: digilocker-verification-card, aadhaar-input, pan-input, verify-aadhaar-btn, verify-pan-btn, status-badge-verified, status-badge-not_verified, verified-badge, partial-verified-badge, verification-msg. Demo mode uses Aadhaar '123456789012' and PAN 'ABCDE1234F'. Customer TEST_RiskScoreCustomer has both Aadhaar and PAN verified.
